query: Boeing Q4S mission entanglement swapping lab test payload compact satellite specification technical details

reasoning: A better enables a correct answer because it contains more of the anchor-supported facts needed to answer the query: Boeing’s Q4S demonstrated high-fidelity entanglement swapping in lab/ground testing on a compact, space-qualified payload; the payload completed environmental qualification; it is in final spacecraft integration; the mission targets a 2027 launch; and it is a one-year on-orbit demonstration intended to inform future quantum networking architectures.
